lesson.description: useEffect hooki komponent lifecycle'ini boshqarish uchun ishlatiladi.

homework.title: useEffect bilan counter yaratish
homework.description: useState va useEffect hooklaridan foydalanib counter ilovasi yarating. Har 3 soniyada background rangi o'zgarishi kerak. Qo'llanma: 1) useState bilan count state yarating 2) useEffect bilan interval o'rnatib har 3 sekundda count oshirilsin 3) count ga qarab background rangi o'zgarsin

submission.feedback: Yaxshi ish! Lekin interval tozalashni unutdingiz.
